extras.content: assure 表示“使确信”时,常用于~ sb. that.../sb. be ~d that...或~ sb. of sth.;表示“确保”时与 ensure 同义。
in confidence 私下地 // take... into one's confidence 把…作为知己 // have confidence in 信任
resist 表示“抵抗”,后只能接名词或动名词作宾语,但不能接不定式。

senses.example: The construction of the Three Gorges Project entails large migration.
senses.example_zh: 三峡工程建设需要大规模移民。

senses.example: Some unclear and confusing road signs bewildered drivers.
senses.example_zh: 一些含糊不清的路标使司机一头雾水。

entries.mnemonic: as(to)+sure(肯定的)→一再肯定→使确信

senses.example: The dentist's confident manner assured me that I was in safe hands.
senses.example_zh: 牙医自信的态度使我确信我正由可靠的医生诊治。
没有什么东西能确保永久的幸福。

derivatives: assurance n. 信心;保证;保险

senses.example: You are every inch as timid as a mouse. // He was timid about saying this.
senses.example_zh: 你真是十足地胆小如鼠。// 此事他羞于启齿。

senses.def_en: trust or faith in a person or thing
senses.example: She took him into her confidence and told him the truth.
senses.example_zh: 她把他当作知心朋友，把真相全告诉了他。

senses.def_en: a feeling or belief that you can do sth. well
senses.example: Most Chinese students lack self-confidence when speaking English.
senses.example_zh: 大多数中国学生在说英语时缺乏自信心。

derivatives: confident a. 确信的;有信心的

senses.example: Remember to keep this information confidential.
senses.example_zh: 记住对这个情报要保密。

senses.example: Don't become too confidential with strangers.
They are determined to resist invasion.

senses.def_en: to remain unchanged or unharmed by
senses.example: This coating is designed to resist rust and the weather.
senses.example_zh: 涂上这一层，是为了防锈，让它经得起风吹雨打。

senses.def_en: to prevent yourself from doing sth. that you want to do
senses.example: Jill couldn't resist making jokes about his baldness.
senses.example_zh: 吉尔忍不住拿他的秃顶开玩笑。

derivatives: resistance n. 抵抗;阻力;敌对

senses.example: I prefer the plants that are resistant to bad climate.
senses.example_zh: 我比较喜欢那些能抵抗恶劣气候的植物。

senses.def_en: to prevent sb. from doing sth. or acting in a certain way
senses.example: The police had difficulty in restraining the crowd from rushing on to the pitch.
senses.example_zh: 警方难以阻止人群涌入球场。

senses.def_en: to hold back or keep in control
senses.example: I can't restrain my anger when I hear of people being cruel to animals.
senses.example_zh: 当听到有人残酷地对待动物的时候，我就抑制不住愤怒。

derivatives: restraint n. 抑制;约束措施

senses.def_en: to keep oneself from doing sth. (~from)
senses.example: They appealed to the protesters to refrain from violence.
senses.example_zh: 他们呼吁抗议者们不要采取暴力行动。
